_comment: Physics answers carry units — graded by lattice-core's units-aware answers_match (value + dimension). '5 m/s^2' == '5 m/s²' == '5 m/s/s'; '6 N' != '6 J'.

problems.content: \text{A car travels } 100\,\text{m in } 5\,\text{s. What is its average speed?}
\text{A runner speeds up from } 0 \text{ to } 30\,\text{m/s in } 6\,\text{s. What is the acceleration?}
\text{An object is dropped from rest } (g = 9.8\,\text{m/s}^2). \text{ How fast is it moving after } 2\,\text{s?}
\text{A net force accelerates a } 2\,\text{kg mass at } 3\,\text{m/s}^2. \text{ What is the force?}
\text{What is the weight of a } 10\,\text{kg object } (g = 9.8\,\text{m/s}^2)?
